top_twitter_engagement.text: 📣 @wodan_secure_ai, a startup specialised in running artificial intelligence models directly on fully encrypted data, has closed a €2 million pre-seed round led by @JME_Ventures , @Swanlaab and @AdaraVentures, with additional participation from Scale Fund.

📢 We’re pleased to announce our latest investment in Kimera Technologies, leading their €2M+ seed funding round and deepening our partnership with the company as it enters its next phase of growth. 🚀

Learn more: https://t.co/M3GGrzcmRp https://t.co/bmO8XSYC1j

🔥 Day 2 of Open Office Hours at #VDS2025!

More than 290 meetings across both days between over 170 startups and 30 investors including @AdaraVentures, @bonsaipartners, @Dozeninvest, @LUMO_Labs, @DemiumStartups, @faradayvp, @ActyusVC and more

Connections, insights and new deals https://t.co/bI2ikIu

📢 We’re excited to announce our investment in Wodan AI, a company building critical infrastructure to make AI operations truly secure. 

Learn more about the €2M pre-seed funding round: https://t.co/X94yA7Makq https://t.co/OYBEGwpzy9

💫 Last month was packed with momentum and meaningful wins across the Adara Ventures portfolio. 

🔗 Read it all in this month’s edition of our #Caminos⛰️ newsletter: https://t.co/L0hsUKQAKz https://t.co/mnlg3nDjck

🌱 Adara Ventures | Seed, Series A, Series B
📍 Madrid, Luxembourg
🎯 Cybersecurity, Energy Transition, Data & AI, Di...

#vc #startups #cybersecurity #energytransition #seriesa
Acoru closes €10M Series A led by 33N Ventures, with participation from  @AdaraVentures  and @AthosCapital  https://t.co/HOiUtUHAxv https://t.co/v1CkTuehOM
. @AdaraVentures  leads €2M+ seed round in Kimera Technologies to power  AI-driven product discovery in eCommerce  https://t.co/Vy0uA7rjuU https://t.co/IZJsJ1XvSq

Our #InvestmentsElewit portfolio keeps growing stronger! 🚀

From energy storage and AI to grid monitoring and infrastructure safety, our startups are shaping the future.
